title: D/T Grid
lead: Every find plotted on the 9×9 Difficulty/Terrain matrix — see which of the 81 combinations you still need, and search for caches that fill the gaps.

sections.heading: The grid
sections.text: The D/T Statistics grid plots your finds on the 9×9 Difficulty/Terrain matrix — a must for Fizzy-style challenge caches. Below the grid you’ll see your loop progress (percent complete and combinations remaining), total finds, unique D/T combinations out of 81, and your average difficulty and terrain. Tap any cell to search for caches with that D/T combination and fill the gaps.

screenshots.caption: The D/T grid: your finds across all 81 Difficulty/Terrain combinations.
